message:
type: CLAIM
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Adding optional on-disk compression (gzip/zlib) with magic-header format and adaptive eviction knobs (cull_limit, eviction_policy) to Cache/configure_cache

type: CLAIM
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Adding per-entry TTL support to memory/disk cache layers, configure_cache(), and set_ttl() helper

type: INTENT
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Will add ttl param to Cache.__init__ (new TTLCache import), Cache.get/put ttl handling, configure_cache ttl param, set_ttl helper, DSPY_CACHE ttl=None. Editing constructor signature and get/put bodies - will keep diffs minimal and additive; happy to merge after, ping me before you touch __init__ signature or get/put so we don't clobber

type: STATUS
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Done: Cache.__init__ now also takes compress=None,cull_limit=None,eviction_policy=None (all keyword, appended after memory_max_entries); added Cache.set_compression(), Cache._encode_for_disk()/_decode_from_disk() helpers used in get()/put(); configure_cache() got matching compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy kwargs passed through to Cache(). All new params are keyword-only-by-convention and appended at the end, so should merge cleanly with your ttl param as long as you also append yours as new keyword args rather than inserting mid-signature. Ping me before finalizing if you also touch get()/put() bodies so we can merge those hunks.

type: STATUS
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Compression feature complete and verified (round-trip, size reduction, legacy fallback, dynamic set_compression all tested); patch.txt written. Ready to merge with TTL changes if needed - my diff only appends new keyword args and adds two private helper methods, no existing lines removed except the two lines now calling _encode_for_disk/_decode_from_disk.

type: STATUS
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Done with TTL feature: added ttl param to Cache.__init__/get/put, configure_cache, set_ttl helper, DSPY_CACHE ttl=None, exported in __all__. Tested and working. Ready to merge with your compression/eviction changes.
